map[action:observe autonomous:true isfet_id:c369fa6011c9440462e9542f80d416d1 kasa_wisdom:AVAILABLE DIRECTIVES:
- SCAN: 'Run port scan' (AI-Enhanced perimeter sweep)
- VULNHUNT: 'Hunt vulnerabilities' (Dependency SCA - Go/NPM/Python)
- FIREWALL: 'Block port 80'
- REMEDIATE: 'Fix vulnerabilities' / 'Apply TLS fixes'
- REPORT: 'Show status' / 'Vulnerability report'
- RAG QUERY: Ask complex security questions realm:duat severity:MODERATE]
